content:
No more exhausting MLM recruiting or hitting brutal quotas! The smartest, most badass way in the world to build passive income.

10 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Quick note: I’m a Japanese artist and I don’t actually speak English fluently at all! 😂
To share my raw story with the world, I wrote everything in Japanese first and used AI as my brainstorming partner to rewrite it into English.
To Everyone Exhausted by Recruiting Businesses⚠️ Are Your Efforts Actually Paying Off?!
If you’re trapped in a recruiting business feeling like “I just can’t do this anymore… 😭”, trust me, you are absolutely not alone. 💕
A few years ago, I was exactly where you are now. 😥
So many people, including my past self, struggle with the brutal gap between the passive income they dreamed of and the harsh reality of making zero progress, no matter how hard they grind. 😭
Why on earth do these businesses leave you so utterly exhausted?
Hi, I’m Larz, The Comical-Shock J-pop Singer.
In this article, I am pouring my soul into exposing the absolute truth: “3 Steps to Get Passive Income Without Exploiting People” 🤩
This story is dedicated to anyone who: 🥹💖⬇️

• Wants to build genuine passive income without forcing, recruiting, or exploiting other people.

• Is completely done with the exhausting human drama and toxic emotional rollercoasters unique to MLMs.
Table of Contents

• To Everyone Exhausted by Recruiting Businesses⚠️ Are Your Efforts Actually Paying Off?!

• 3 Reasons Why Recruiting Businesses Will Utterly Drain You

• The Toxic Architecture: How “Must Recruit” and “Must Keep Them Buying” Breeds Suffocating Human Drama

• 【Premium Content From Here】 3 Steps to Earn Passive Income Without Exploiting People
3 Reasons Why Recruiting Businesses Will Utterly Drain You
I bet you’re grinding yourself to the bone 24/7/365, desperately clinging to the belief that “if I help someone else succeed, I’ll succeed too” and “this is all to build my passive income.” 🥺
Yet, your relentless efforts go completely unrewarded, leaving you utterly exhausted in both body and mind. Why on earth does this happen?
1. The Non-Stop Pressure of Cold Prospecting 🥶
The absolute core of any recruiting business is the endless loop of hunting down and acquiring brand-new recruits. 🔥

• ① Making a comprehensive list of your close family, friends, and acquaintances.

• ② Hitting up the people on that list via individual DMs to lock down dates and times for a 3-way meeting (Setting the Appointment).

• ③ Connecting your upline mentors, yourself, and the prospect in that 3-way meeting to steer them into signing the contract (The Closing).
See what I mean? These three processes alone burn through an absolute mountain of mental energy. 😵‍💫
A few years ago, I was a total “loner” who couldn’t find a single person in my hometown who shared my values or vibes.
So naturally, the number of people I could actually put on a prospect list was a solid zero. 😢
“What should I say to whom at today’s meetup?! 😰”
“What kind of social media post will actually get people hooked?! 🤔”
Constantly keeping your radar up like this, hunting for the next recruit while suffocating under the endless pressure of “I have to keep pitching people… 😰” — it’s so much more brutal than anyone could ever imagine, isn’t it? 😢
2. The Fear of Being Hated and the Crushing Guilt 🥶
In the recruiting business, you are constantly forced to drag your closest personal relationships — friends, acquaintances, and family — into the mix. 😰
This creates a unique, toxic kind of stress that is completely different from any conventional business. 😭
“If that person ends up hating me, my life might literally be over… 😰”
A relationship you worked so hard to build over the years suddenly turns incredibly awkward and tense the exact moment you bring up the business. 💔
Have you ever had an experience like that?
Continuing to pitch people while constantly terrified of fracturing your relationships and being hated takes a massive toll on your mental health. 😢
“I feel like everything is entirely my fault… 😭”
Every single time a prospect rejects or criticizes you, haven’t you felt exactly like that?
“Maybe I just explained it wrong? 🤔”
“Did they just reject me as a person? 😰”
The constant friction and cold rejections in your human relationships leave deep, trauma-level scars on your heart. 😭💔
3. The Anxiety and Self-Doubt of Seeing Zero Results 😢
No matter how hard you push yourself, the results just don’t follow. 😢
You find yourself unable to hit those monthly quotas. 😭
When this situation drags on, don’t you start feeling these anxieties building up inside? 😰⬇️
“Am I just not talented enough?”
“Is this business model just not a good fit for me?”
“Everyone else around me is succeeding, so why am I the only one getting nowhere?”
Every time we hear from our uplines or the so-called “top achievers,” we get hit with a rush of anxiety, thinking, “I have to be just like them.” 😰
But if you keep repeating that cycle of unrewarded effort, and keep forcing yourself to accept a reality where your hard work doesn’t translate to results, it’s obvious that your self-confidence is gradually going to erode, isn’t it? 🥺
The Toxic Architecture: How “Must Recruit” and “Must Keep Them Buying” Breeds Suffocating Human Drama
Why on earth can’t you escape the suffocating pressure of “I must recruit” and “I must keep them buying”?
At the very root of this issue lies your intense desire to “earn passive income,” deeply entangled with the flawed nature of the “business model” itself that you’re using to achieve it.
Why Obsessing Over Passive Income Leaves You at the Mercy of Your Prospects’ Emotions
Passive income is undeniably attractive — it’s something literally everyone wants to get their hands on. 🤩
But here is the catch! ‼️ When you try to chase it through a recruiting business, you will constantly find yourself at the mercy of your prospects’ heavy, negative emotions. 😱
“If this person doesn’t sign the contract, I won’t get any income… 😰”
You end up riding an emotional rollercoaster over every tiny shift in their facial expression or every single word they drop, desperately trying to read between the lines of their emotions. 😱
The reason is glaringly obvious: your prospect’s “yes” directly dictates your income. 🥺
This traps you in a mindset where it feels as if your entire livelihood depends entirely on someone else’s mood, doesn’t it? 😵‍💫
“How can I convince this person to say yes?! 🧐”
When a prospect’s reaction is lukewarm, we easily fall into the trap of thinking, “Maybe my pitch was bad?” or “Maybe they don’t understand how great the product is?” — and we end up trying way too hard to persuade them using every trick in the book. 😰
But in reality, this is a dangerous red flag showing that you are prioritizing your own agenda (closing the deal) over the actual needs and feelings of the person in front of you. 😱
Unfortunately, that kind of hidden agenda or desperation bleeds through instantly, and your prospect will pick up on it immediately. 😰
That’s why, before you even meet them, it’s so much better to brainstorm standard “questions” beforehand that will naturally draw out their actual needs and struggles. 💕
The Subconscious Pressure of “You Are the One Who Must Make the Money”
Organizations in the recruiting business love to push the narrative: “If you succeed, everyone around you will be happy too.”
At first glance, it sounds like pure encouragement.
But before you know it, this morphs into a heavy, subconscious pressure whispering, “You are the one who absolutely must make the money,” weighing you down completely. 😱
“I have to live up to the expectations of my upline and my team‼️”
The expectations from your upline and team — or even your own idealized image of success — ironically corner you into a toxic loop of thinking, “I just need to grind even harder.” 😱
As a result, you end up prioritizing your own metrics and results over genuinely caring for the person in front of you. 😱
When that happens, it’s painfully obvious that the future of your team is headed toward an absolute trainwreck, isn’t it? 💔
“In the end, it all just comes down to me working myself to death… 🥶”
Even while preaching that it’s “for someone else’s sake,” the ultimate reality is that you are the one forced to deliver the numbers. 😰
This exact structure twists human relationships into something suffocating and purely transactional, where everyone is just “using each other.” 😩
Without you even realizing it, your obsession with “passive income” might be the very reason you’ve started viewing genuine human connections purely as business tools. 🥺
【Premium Content From Here】 3 Steps to Earn Passive Income Without Exploiting People
Up to this point, we’ve dug deep into the exact reasons why the recruiting business leaves you completely exhausted and burned out.
So, is there actually a way to earn true passive income while being entirely liberated from all this relationship stress and the suffocating pressure of recruiting?
The answer is a resounding “Yes, absolutely! ❣️” 🤩
The solution I finally arrived at — “how to build passive income without exploiting people” — requires absolutely ZERO recruiting.
You will never, ever have to deal with anyone else’s heavy, negative emotions again. 🥺💕
And today, I am going to share this exact method with you in this premium section. 💰
This approach completely flips the conventional “common sense” of the recruiting industry right on its head. 🤩
By putting this method into practice, you can finally unlock the money, mental freedom, and passive income you’ve always wanted — all without ever making a single person your sacrifice. 🤩
⚠️ The premium content begins right below! ⬇️

Now, from here on out, I’m going to share the exact method to “earn passive income without exploiting people.” 🤩
① Try asking AI this exact prompt ⬇️
“I want to publish a paid article on Medium sharing my experiences from when I was in an MLM — specifically the cold rejections I faced when recruiting, and the harsh, borderline character assassination critiques I received from my uplines and top achievers. Instead of just a messy, emotional rant, I want to structure this into a logical, highly readable, and smart article framework.”
② Once the AI delivers its response and advice, use that as a foundation to draft your own raw MLM experiences.
You have total freedom to decide exactly where to draw the line and turn it into paid content.
③ Publish your drafted article on Medium as a paid story.
That’s literally it! ❣️ Unexpectedly simple, isn’t it?
This exact method is just one of the core techniques from what I call “AI Weaponization.” 🤪
By doing this, former MLM dropouts just like you from all over the globe will gladly pay their hard-earned money to read your premium articles. 🤩
You no longer have to live in constant fear of a prospect’s reaction or the tiny numbers on your commission checks. 🤩
Your heart and your wallet, which used to be trapped on a violent rollercoaster ride of emotional highs and lows, will finally regain peace and security.
You can finally live your life with true breathing room and absolute freedom. 🥹💕
And,Can you actually believe this?
Just a few years ago, I was an exploited underdog, trapped in a sub-$3/hour slavery life. 😭
But today, everything is different. I stood on that main stage as the star, sang my original song “Set it Free” solo, and drove a crowd of 1,000 people absolutely wild! 🤩✨
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Singing on the stage of “Woman Next Fes 2026”Back then, I was completely crushed by that insane upfront fee of $2,000 to $10,000, and I almost gave up on singing the songs I truly wanted to sing.
But standing on that stage, rocking a crowd of 1,000 passionate people, was the most blissfully happy, thrilling 3 minutes of my entire life. 🥹💕
